name: ai-interview
description: AI-powered interview platform — root workspace scripts

scripts.setup: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.up: docker-compose up -d mongodb redis 2>/dev/null || true; fuser -k 4000/tcp 3001/tcp 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 1 && concurrently --names backend,worker,frontend --prefix-colors cyan,yellow,magenta "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix backend run worker" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.down: fuser -k 4000/tcp 3001/tcp 2>/dev/null || true; docker-compose down 2>/dev/null || true; echo '[down] done'
scripts.fresh: npm run down; npm run setup && npm run up
